stemHtml: Which of the following statements best describes the Bora?

options.a: It is a steady and cool northerly wind, blowing in Greece, Turkey and above the Aegean Sea in summer.
options.b: It is a strong, cold squally downslope wind at the Adriatic coast.
options.c: It blows over Italy from a southerly direction, is a warm and sometimes humid wind, often transporting dust and sand.
options.d: It is a strong and gusty wind, blowing from a north-north-westerly direction through the Rhone valley in France.
